summary: Solid 1990 show with strong Cassidy→Deal and Wharf Rat transitions, captured on a good‑sounding soundboard despite first‑set level hiccups.
review: The performance is consistently enjoyable – the first set ends powerfully with Cassidy into Deal, while Estimated Prophet into Eyes builds nicely and the second set delivers psychedelic Wharf Rat into Sugar Magnolia. The SBD source sounds clear overall, though reviewers note uneven volume levels on the opening half of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 4‑star and praise the musical flow; recording issues are limited to first‑set level swings, yielding a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First set suffers from fluctuating volume levels and minor tape‑related mix imperfections; second set is much cleaner and more balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is solid but a bit uneven in sound; transition from Estimated to Eyes feels slightly awkward. Second set picks up momentum with interesting jams and a very psychedelic Wharf Rat segment.
